name: Mushroom & Parmesan Risotto
recipeIngredient: salt and freshly ground black pepper
350 long-grain or Arborio rice, see tips
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the onion and finely chop it. Finely peel the lemon and remove the rind; squeeze out the juice.
2. Wipe mushrooms with a damp cloth, then slice them. Break broccoli into small florets, top and tail French beans, and halve lengthwise.
3. Blanch the broccoli and beans together in boiling, salted water for 3-4 minutes. Drain and refresh.
4. Heat olive oil in a heavy-based saucepan. Cook onion gently for about 2-3 minutes until starting to soften. Stir in rice and saffron; pour in wine. Add lemon rind, lemon juice, and stock. Bring to boil, stirring.
5. Cover and simmer for 5 minutes. Stir in vegetables. Re-cover and simmer for another 5 minutes or until rice is tender and most liquid absorbed.
6. Discard lemon rind. Serve topped with slivers of Parmesan cheese.
